reference: If the foot pain is in one leg, then it won't help; if it is in both legs, then yes, it may help. I wish you could tell me if the pain is localized or widespread, the time of day it occurs, and whether it happens when walking or at rest. Good luck.
text: If the foot pain is in one leg, then it won't help. If it is in both legs, then yes, it may help. I wish you could tell me if the pain is localized or widespread, the time of day it occurs, and whether it happens when walking or at rest. Good luck.
